creator: pankov_p@mail.ru
text:
This is the successor fork of net-p2p/microdc. I plan to send other PR about marking net-p2p/microdc DEPRECATED in favour of net-p2p/microdc2, because it's no longer in development.
If the archive is broken, it can be fetched from http://www.pankov.pp.ru/stuff/microdc2.shar
